storyInfo: By the riverside of Kajimachi, beneath the fireworks, Mifune spills the beans about the twisted hatred he has accumulated for Tessai and the others, but also shows a hint of tiredness and longing before the final showdown. Listening to the current state of Mitsukue—a place no longer recognizable as the hometown she once knew—Hoshiguma burns with the flames of rage, not just for Tessai, and not only at Mifune.

attributes.content: No, Madame Oni! I can't let you go any further!
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: I have to save him.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Madame Oni!
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: There is no time. I'll only say once more. Get out of my way.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Are you really Madame Oni? Is there any humanity left in you?
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: Why... why wouldn't I be Madame Oni?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Shuuji is dead! You killed him!
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: Shuu...ji...?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're not Madame Oni anymore... you're just an Oni... a vicious Oni, even...
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: You would kill the brother you drank at the same table with, and you wouldn't even hesitate, as long as we're in your way...
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: Will you kill me too, vicious Oni?
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: Out of the way... Koutarou.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I can't turn back. I must stop Kinbee, no matter what!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Vicious Oni!!!
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: She instinctively raises her sword, pointing it in front of her.
The man charges towards her, but the sword goes through his chest, as though he has intentionally impaled himself upon it.
Did he do it on purpose? Or did she parry his blade, then...
Vicious Oni...
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: Go... to hell...
attributes.name: Anguished Yakuza

attributes.content: Vicious Oni?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Am I... a vicious Oni?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Oni?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Blood fills her eyes, blinding her.
She will cut down anyone who charges at her.
She will strike back at any weapon that strikes at her.
More cries, the sound of weapons cutting through the night, discombobulated sounds that blend into a single lump in her chest, beating with her heart, pulsing—
Until it fully synchronizes with her heartbeat, drowning out all other sounds.
In the bloody haze, the vicious Oni keeps walking and killing, leaving behind a trail of blood and bodies, until she reaches the run-down shack and kicks the door open.
There is no sound there.
The vicious Oni stands at the door, cocking her head, as though she is listening for some kind of sound coming from hell that humans cannot hear.
Until she hears a trembling voice.
...dead.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Who's dead?
The Diet candidate... is dead.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The Diet candidate is dead?
The cries fade. The sound of weapons cutting through air fades. The sound of heartbeat fades. All the sounds grow distant and fade.
Only the voices from hell echo by her ear, clearer than ever.
Oni.
Vicious Oni.
Go to hell.
This place.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I picked this empty lot by the riverbank rather than those ruins along the way, so you won't be distracted by the memories. No need to thank me.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Good timing, too. The fireworks show isn't over yet.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What? Getting cold feet now?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I just wanted to clear up everything before we started fighting.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What else isn't clear?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Only one thing.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Where did your hatred come from?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I ran into Tetsuya at the TV station and heard from him what happened when Uncle Tessai died. You didn't have to be so cruel.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I don't know how he treated you all these years, but he must not have seen you as an adversary if you got as far as to turn him into a figurehead.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Beside, I didn't think I did you any wrong. When I came back to Mitsukue, all I wanted was to make sure that my sacrifice wasn't meaningless—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sacrifice?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: That's why you make me sick, you and Tessai.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You're a fool, and he's an even bigger fool. Even if you really did accidentally kill the candidate, did you think he wouldn't know to frame me for it, since I was there too?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He favored you, so I kept waiting for the day when he would make me 'take responsibility' for the murder.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: It would have been the best result. He would protect his favorite, while eliminating a subordinate who had been going over his head.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: As for that little thing about killing one's brothers... what does it matter? Who would be foolish enough to speak up, with Hannya in your hand and his support behind you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: But he chose to cut ties with his favorite, choosing honor over family... how sickening.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Did he really not know that the oyabun of the Kinsekikai was the furthest thing from 'honor', or did he just pretend not to know?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Honor is a personal thing. When a group of people start acting in the name of honor, they'll either fall apart, or they're just dregs of society fooling themselves.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Tessai always liked to boast, talking about how yakuza were pathetic outcasts that could only live under the protection of the syndicate.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Retired veterans, hoodlums, gamblers, peddlers, orphans... Tessai united them under the banner of Kinsekikai, hoping they would love each other like family...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Forget everything before that night for a moment and let's just talk about what happened after the diet candidate's death. Shimasu tried to blackmail me, Gouda tried to undermine me, and Sanoguchi tried to exclude me as he once excluded you...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Family? Nothing more than old Tessai's pipe dream.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Besides, is it anything more than just an excuse for one's failure to fit into society? What do you say, Officer Hoshiguma? If what he said was true, then what are you, and what am I?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If this is your idea of fitting into society, I'm glad I was the one who took responsibility.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Finally, you're making sense, Officer Hoshiguma. You have no idea how lucky you are.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You took responsibility and left. I chose silence and stayed, cleaning up the mess that you and Tessai left behind.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Are the public up in arms about the yakuza killing a Diet candidate? Then spend money, build industries and tread on your own dignity to butter up real Diet members.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Getting hit by TV reports? Build your own media through crystalline industry, and change the image of the yakuza.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: People starting to have designs on your burgeoning industry? Set your pride aside, and cling to the people who have the most use of you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Run into someone that you can't soothe over? Then there's no choice. Eliminate them.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: And you're complaining about it? Didn't you choose it yourself?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yes, I chose it. I let my own weakness shut my own mouth that night!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You chose the twisted path of shame and guilty conscience—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Guilty conscience?!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Don't make me laugh, Officer Hoshiguma!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The path I chose showed just how incompetent Tessai was, how hypocritical his honor was, and how close his Kinsekikai was to destruction!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He was an incompetent, blind shogi player who began to abandon piece after piece for his precious Kinsekikai as changing times threatened to checkmate it.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Your incident was just the beginning. The concept of 'Diet' had just emerged, and he had already abandoned you.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: When the relationship between North and South was at its most delicate, he was foolish enough to buy weapons from Northern Court factions, just to destroy a gang that was acting out of line in his eyes, one that had better weapons than the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He didn't even have that much of a grudge against them, other than the fact that they had once harbored the 'Wandering Vicious Oni' who killed his family.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Ostensibly, he was taking revenge for his wife and son. And look what came of it! He abandoned Tetsuya's mother and turned Tetsuya against him.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: As for me? How many times would he have abandoned me, but for the fact that this lieutenant of his never believed in this 'honor' of his for even a moment?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I was proven right, time and again. He's no more than a Pawn who thinks himself a King, charging blindly into the fray...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Did he think promotion awaited? No, everyone else, friend or foe, was walking in the opposite direction. There is nothing but a dead end awaiting him at the end of the road.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: To hold back the tide for that fool, clean up his mess, all the while getting walked all over by him?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I would rather you had killed me in your madness that night!
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Happy now? Is that enough reason for you to bring your sword or shield to bear?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I only have one question. Are you putting on an act?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...An act?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I agree that he could have reinforced his position by putting the blame on you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I can understand why you say that the oyabun of the Kinsekikai is the furthest from honor.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I believe you when you say you stemmed the tide of Kinsekikai's destruction, and that you are angry at Uncle Tessai for being in the way.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Then what do you want to say?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I just don't know what to think anymore.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It was you who brought me back to Kajimachi. It was you who tried to make me lose my reason and eliminate me once and for all.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It was you who earned Tetsuya's fervent loyalty. It was you who made him witness his own father's death at your hands.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It was you who cut off your own finger in front of Uncle Tessai. It was you who cursed his incompetence, even unto his death.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Your analysis was very clear, very rational. I fully understood what you were saying, and how you got to this point.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But the clearer and more rational it is, the less I could believe it...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Is this really you? Or is this all one final act of madness, written and directed by yourself, so that I would believe that this is the kind of person you are?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Uncle Tessai said you were faking it when you cut off your little finger that day in Kajimachi. I didn't believe it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But now, I really want to know... how many fingers are there under your left glove?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The Phidia freezes.
He stares into Hoshiguma's eyes, as though waiting for her to avert her gaze.
Realizing that it is pointless, he snorts and displays his left hand in front of him, before slowly removing his glove.
A little finger made of machinery rather than flesh and blood trembles where the pinkie should be.
I want to tell you that the little finger I cut off had been with me for decades, but you wouldn't believe it, would you?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Haha... very good, very good.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Of all the things you said, there's only one that has a little bit of value.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Honor... is a personal thing.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Are you done?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Yeah.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: If you've got any men hiding out here, now would be a good time to holler for them.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: There's only me. No one in hiding, no traps, no tricks.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Is the life of a media mogul, a politician's favorite, the oyabun of the Kinsekikai, something to be taken so lightly?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Mogul? Not for long.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Politician? You made sure to put an end to that personally.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Oyabun of the Kinsekikai? Remind me who crashed the accession ceremony again?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If you think I've been acting, congratulations, because I'm tired of it.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm just a yakuza. A yakuza backed into a corner.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: If that's the only death I can have, then I would have a clean death... a beautiful death.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Even if everything you've done up to this point was one big pile of dishonor?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm not talking about honor—that rusty piece of trash floating around your and Tessai's heads.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I'm talking about beauty.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: What's about to happen may not compare to making a son watch his father die for him, but you cannot deny...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: There's a beauty to a duel by the riverside, under the fireworks, the blood spilling on the banks, perhaps even a head flying into the air.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Don't worry, Hoshiguma. In the event that I'm not the one who dies, I'll admit that you wrote a beautiful ending for yourself as a yakuza.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I don't need it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm fighting you for one reason. To cut my last ties with you, with the Kinsekikai, with Mitsukue and with Higashi.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Suit yourself. But how should I sing the song of your death, in the event that it happens? Who did I kill? An Oni?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: An Oni.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: An Oni who has lost her home forever.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Mifune says no more.
He pulls his long sword, which seems far too long for most men, but just right for him.
The blade is sharp as snow, but hidden in the night, as summer frost that should not be, that could fade away any moment.
I had a thought, Hoshiguma.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: That pompousness that had filled his voice up to this point is completely gone.
When we were young, Tessai took us to watch the snow, here by this very riverside.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I remember.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: He said, don't look down on yourself just because you're yakuza.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He said we're descendants of warriors. He said generations after generations of samurai since Shigekazu Onishoubu have given their lives for loyalty and righteousness, and we are their legacy.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He said that even without noble status, without power, without a liege to serve, even without the bloodline of warriors...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Loyalty and righteousness never die. The warrior's spirit never dies.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Jingi, ninkyou, honor in all its names.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: The warrior's spirit lives on, even if it has fallen on hard times, even if it has become distorted, even if it has taken on many different names, even if no bonds of blood tie us.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: He was spewing nonsense, wasn't he? It was all an act, wasn't it?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Mifune stares straight into Hoshiguma's eyes.
You don't know the answer?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: There's only one thing that I know.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Someone you hated so much would never put on an act for you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sure enough.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You trusted him, and I trust you. I believe you when you say that Tessai didn't lie to me. I believe that we're the last descendants of warriors, here in Nan'in Anzai Mitsukueooyashiro.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: As for the true blue-blooded warriors whose emblems are passed on from generation to generation...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I suppose they're all speculating in real estate right now.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Kinbee sneers.
Opposite him, the blue flames of rage burn brightly around Hoshiguma.
No longer does it burn for Kinbee, but bright it burns, almost burning through the brightly suffocating night of Mitsukue—
And then, in the blink of an eye, it is over.
The two stand with their backs towards each other, having swapped places in the exchange.
Hoshiguma returns her sword to its sheath.
Kinbee's figure drops lower and lower, until he falls to the ground, no longer able to stand.
You... you're not injured at all?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I have a slight cut on my face.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What about me?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I can feel myself bleeding, Hoshiguma, but I don't want to look.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: Tell me. How much time do I have left?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I don't know.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I think there'll be someone here soon, after I leave. I think you'll live a pretty long time.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why didn't you kill me?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: You and I, we have nothing to do with each other anymore.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: There will be other people to judge you for Uncle Tessai and Momoka.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ha, haha...
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: After all these years, at the end of it all... you won.
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: No, I lost.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Completely.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You hate the way of this city so very much?
attributes.name: Mifune

attributes.content: I just don't recognize it anymore.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's no longer my home, that's all.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sayounara. We won't meet again.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma turns and walks towards the ruins of Kajimachi.
Lying on the ground, Kinbee casts his eyes towards the other side of the river, as he feels the cold of his own blood leaving his body.
The noise and commotion look down coldly on the empty shores on this side, which will soon become much shinier and brighter.

The one-horned Oni walks past the ruins of old buildings, past the indifferent bustle of the entertainment district, past the foe who had crossed swords with her a moment ago, and into the glaring dark night.
A cool breeze blows from behind, bringing fresh liberation, and sounds that do not belong to the present.
Going to the summer fair with her father, and the unscrupulous yatai owner giving her a net made of the flimsiest paper for scooping fins.
That summer night after her father's passing, she licked the apple candy Tessai gave her that did not seem right for her age.
The throwing rings that seemed too juvenile for her, but which could never seem to hit their mark, as though they were imbued with some sort of Arts.
Going to the shooting stall with a 'Holy City of Laterano' sign that only had cheap stuff, after getting drunk with her Kinsekikai brothers...
She takes one step after another towards these scenes of Higashinese summer nights.
But they are ghosts of the past, brushing by her, fading into the distance like the one she has defeated...
And the fireworks.
Yes, the fireworks of Higashi's summer nights, which she may never have a chance to see again.
So, you didn't see any of the fireworks at all?
Basically.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What? You missed the entire fireworks show?
Yeah.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: That's such a shame... well...
At least you'll see this.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I couldn't find any fireworks that nice. All I found on Nita Street was small stuff like this...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Don't be sad, okay?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Why would I be sad?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm so relieved to hear that.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: A surprise encounter with someone wearing a surprising smile on her face, and carrying a surprising gift.
Hoshiguma feels tears coming to her eyes.
The tiny fireworks in front of her seem brighter than the rest of the city combined.
It's beautiful.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Fleeting... but beautiful.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Where are the others? Kichisei, Sarasa, Moriuchi... and Tetsuya?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Kichisei and Moriuchi-san are being questioned by that tired-looking cop. They should be coming out soon.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Sarasa suddenly fell asleep one block before we ran into the cops. She told us to just leave her there. By the time I talked to the cops and went back for her, she was nowhere to be seen.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: As for Tetsuya... I have no idea.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Oh, we should also let the police know that Kinbee is still lying on the river bank, and someone should go and get him—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: They're already headed over.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: There you are! What are you doing? Hosting your own fireworks show?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Looks like it.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: We have someone here who missed the entire thing, after all. Gotta make it up somehow, right?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (This is...)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (...Kami-sama?)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What's the matter, Hoshiguma? Did something happen?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: No, nothing... just imagining things.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It seems that the kami smiled at her—or perhaps, it has always been smiling.
The figure begins to fade, and the firework that Momoka is holding is close to going out.
The last sparks fade into the darkness.
